report: Patient initially appears still, then shifts to a tonic stiffening phase with right arm extension and left arm flexion, accompanied by a blank stare and rightward head version. Subsequently, clonic jerks become evident, evolving into bilateral tonic-clonic movements involving both arms and legs with a rhythmic pattern. The patient remains unresponsive throughout the seizure.
